Describe the sequence of actions performed by the person wearing the white helmet from the dock to the jump.
canonical_answer: At 0s, a person wearing a white helmet sits on the dock edge holding a handle; at 2s, the person stands up on the water ski as it surfaces; at 4s, the skier generates spray while moving across calm water; at 8s, the person on water skis becomes airborne above a dark ramp structure.

question: Describe the visible equipment and background changes observed during the water skiing sequence.
canonical_answer: At 0s, a single water ski is partially submerged near a wooden dock; at 4s, green trees appear under a clear blue sky behind the skier; at 8s, a large dark ramp structure floats on the water; at 12s, a red and white motorboat with a canopy creates a white wake.
